options.name: -all
options.description: Specifies that all pin guides will be deleted.

options.name: -name
options.description: Specifies the name of the partition pin guide object.

options.name: -net
options.description: For nets, specifies the name of the net. For buses, specifies the name of the bus or the bus radix.

options.name: -netGroup
options.description: Specifies the name of the net group.

options.name: -pin
options.description: Specifies the name of the pin.

options.name: -pinGroup
options.description: Specifies the name of the pin group.
